title: aita for yelling at my mom?
text: my mom is white and laughed at my mixed son when i braided his hair saying he doesn’t have the right hair type for it. my son has 3a/3b hair. she also says he shouldn’t wear bonnets or durags to bed because, “he doesn’t need it”. so when i came home last night after braiding his hair and she laughed i went off on her and told her i’d stop bringing him around her. she of course says she’s just looking out for him. aita?

storyboard.content: My mom is white, and my son is mixed race with 3a/3b hair texture.
My mom laughed at my son when I braided his hair, saying he doesn’t have the right hair type for it.
She also says he shouldn’t wear bonnets or durags to bed because “he doesn’t need it.”
When I came home last night after braiding his hair and she laughed, I went off on her.
I told her I’d stop bringing my son around her.
She says she’s just looking out for him.
